name: @archerjessop/utilities
description: Shared utilities for ArcherJessop property analysis tools

scripts.build: rollup -c && bash -c 'mkdir -p dist/styles && cp src/styles/*.css dist/styles/'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.release:patch: npm test && npm version patch && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm test && npm version minor && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm test && npm version major && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags

author: ArcherJessop
